Name: GraphicsConfig_MotionBlurQuality_win64
Description: Determines the parameters of each motion blur quality level.

Fields.Name: Enable Motion Blur
Fields.Description: If ON, motion blur is enabled

Fields.Name: Enable Object Motion Blur
Fields.Description: If ON, motion blur is applied to objects.

Fields.Name: Lower Velocity Buffer Resolution
Fields.Description: Reduce the resolution of the velocity buffer used internally. No effect if precision velocity buffers are not being used.

Fields.Name: Simple Filter Mode
Fields.Description: If ON, ignore reconstruction filter for motion blur calculations, and instead use a lighter process.

Fields.Name: Sample Count Bias
Fields.Description: Set the bias to apply to the sample count. Set to a multiple of 2.

Fields.Name: Recurrence Count Bias
Fields.Description: Set the bias to apply to the number of recursive blurs.

Fields.Name: Scale Value for Blur Maximum Length
Fields.Description: The scale value to use for the blur maximum length parameter.
